sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; const InvoicePreview = ({ invoice }) => { const handlePrint = () => { window.print(); }; const itemsList = invoice.items.map(item => `• ${item.name}: ${item.quantity} x ₹${item.rate} = ₹${item.amount}`).join('\n'); const whatsappMessage = `*MULANI ELECTRICALS - INVOICE*\n--------------------------------\n*Customer:* ${invoice.customerName}\n*Date:* ${invoice.date}\n--------------------------------\n*Items:*\n${itemsList}\n--------------------------------\n*Subtotal:* ₹${invoice.subtotal}\n*Discount:* -₹${invoice.discount}\n*Grand Total: ₹${invoice.finalTotal}*\n--------------------------------\nThank you for your business!`; const customerWhatsappUrl = `https://wa.me/91${invoice.customerPhone}?text=${encodeURIComponent(whatsappMessage)}`; const adminWhatsappUrl = `https://wa.me/917498045041?text=${encodeURIComponent(`*ADMIN COPY - INVOICE #${invoice.id}*\n\n` + whatsappMessage)}`; return (

INVOICE

#{invoice.id}

Sohail Mulani

Electrician Specialist

Nashik, Maharashtra

Phone: 7498045041

Bill To:

{invoice.customerName}

{invoice.customerPhone}

{invoice.customerAddress}

Date:

{invoice.date}

{invoice.items.map((item, idx) => ( ))}
Item Description Qty Rate Amount
{item.name} {item.quantity} ₹{item.rate} ₹{item.amount}
Subtotal: ₹{invoice.subtotal}
Discount: - ₹{invoice.discount}
Total Amount: ₹{invoice.finalTotal}

Payment Methods

GPay / PhonePe / Paytm

7498045041

"Quality work is our signature."

Thank you for choosing Sohail Mulani!

Scan & Pay Now

Amount Payable

₹{invoice.finalTotal}

Send to Customer Send to My WhatsApp
); }; export default InvoicePreview;
